_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors

_contextSnippet: Four patient-derived MPNST cell lines (JH-2–002, JH-2–009, JH-2–031 and JH-2–055)
details: Patient material from JH-2-055-b (referenced as JH-2-055 in this publication) used as a patient-derived MPNST cell line in AAV vector gene replacement therapy study for NF1-related tumors
